rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition For Approval Of Tenth Account Current November 1, 2016 Thru October 31,2018 And Report Of Conservator For Allowance Of Fees Under Court-Ordered Biennial Conservatorship Accountings, Probate Code 2620 With Exhibits
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/15/19. Late filed "correction" was an amendment to the accounting. An amending pleading requires the same notice as the pleading it amends. [CRC 7.53(a).] A Notice of Hearing may not refer to "Attached" for the caption of the pleading(s) to be heard.
